Klasse StreamClassLoader

java.lang.Object
java.lang.ClassLoader
org.quurz.plugins.internal.StreamClassLoader
public class StreamClassLoader extends ClassLoader

A ClassLoader that loads classes and resources from a JAR InputStream.

This class loader reads the entire content of the provided input stream during initialisation and stores the classes and resources in memory.

Seit:
1.0.0

    Konstruktoren

    StreamClassLoader(@NonNull InputStream inputStream, @Nullable ClassLoader parent)

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden ClassLoader

    clearAssertionStatus, defineClass, defineClass, defineClass, defineClass, definePackage, findClass, findLibrary, findLoadedClass, findResource, findResource, findResources, findSystemClass, getClassLoadingLock, getDefinedPackage, getDefinedPackages, getName, getPackage, getPackages, getParent, getPlatformClassLoader, getResource, getResources, getSystemClassLoader, getSystemResource, getSystemResourceAsStream, getSystemResources, getUnnamedModule, isRegisteredAsParallelCapable, loadClass, loadClass, registerAsParallelCapable, resolveClass, resources, setClassAssertionStatus, setDefaultAssertionStatus, setPackageAssertionStatus, setSigners

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • StreamClassLoader

      public StreamClassLoader(@NonNull InputStream inputStream) throws IOException

      Creates a new StreamClassLoader from the specified input stream.

      Parameter:
      inputStream - the InputStream containing the JAR data; must not be null
      Löst aus:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while reading the stream
      NullPointerException - if inputStream is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • StreamClassLoader

      public StreamClassLoader(@NonNull InputStream inputStream, @Nullable ClassLoader parent) throws IOException

      Creates a new StreamClassLoader from the specified input stream with the given parent class loader.

      Parameter:
      inputStream - the InputStream containing the JAR data; must not be null
      parent - the parent ClassLoader; may be null
      Löst aus:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while reading the stream
      NullPointerException - if inputStream is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

  • Methodendetails

    • findClass

      protected Class<?> findClass(String name) throws ClassNotFoundException

      Finds and loads the class with the specified name from the in-memory data.

      Setzt außer Kraft:
      findClass in Klasse ClassLoader
      Parameter:
      name - the binary name of the class; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      the resulting Class object
      Löst aus:
      ClassNotFoundException - if the class could not be found
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • getResourceAsStream

      public InputStream getResourceAsStream(String name)

      Returns an input stream for reading the specified resource.

      Setzt außer Kraft:
      getResourceAsStream in Klasse ClassLoader
      Parameter:
      name - the resource name; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      an InputStream for reading the resource, or null if not found
      Seit:
      1.0.0
